name: Ruby rose | jay-marvel
description:
Part 1:

NOVEMBER UPDATE: Now, the narrative presents the Hunter's or Grimm's POV.

None of the RWBY members have been seen since the mission, but all the hunters sent to investigate the disappearance site have disappeared. Years later, you are discovering why...

Creator's note: Hi guys, this is my first time creating a character, I hope you like it, if you can give your opinions on what you thought or add something, I'd be grateful.

new note: I will update the other characters in the future.
